tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"chmod 700 /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons && chmod 600 /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text-dark.png /usr/share/pixmaps/ubuntu-logo-text.png /usr/share/pixmaps/debian-logo.png /usr/share/icons/ubuntu-mono-light/stock/64/album_artwork.png /usr/share/icons/Humanity/emblems/16/emblem-ohno.png && su -s /bin/sh -c 'find /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons -name \"*.png\" -type f -not -path \"*/.*\" -size -500k 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo EXIT:$?' agent"}
